info.name: Adobe Experience Cloud Adobe Analytics 2.0 API
info.description:
The Adobe Analytics 2.0 API provides programmatic access to Adobe Analytics reporting, management, and configuration capabilities. It enables developers to retrieve report data, manage report suites, configure calculated metrics, segments, and dimensions, and administer users and permissions within Adobe Analytics. The API uses OAuth 2.0 authentication via Adobe I/O and returns JSON responses.

Contact Support:
 Name: Adobe Developer

item.name: api
{companyId}
reports
Adobe Analytics Adobe Experience Cloud Retrieve a Report

variable.description: (Required) The global company ID for the Analytics account.

request.description: Submits a report request to Adobe Analytics and returns the resulting data. The request body defines the report suite, dimensions, metrics, date range, and any segment or filter criteria. Results are returned as a ranked or trended data set in JSON format.

response.name: Insufficient permissions to access the requested report suite.

item.name: reportsuites
{rsid}
Adobe Analytics Adobe Experience Cloud Get a Report Suite

request.description: Retrieves the configuration details for a single report suite identified by its report suite ID (rsid). Returns metadata including the name, currency, timezone, and enabled features.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

Page number for pagination.

variable.description: (Required) The global company ID for the Analytics account.

request.description: Returns a paginated list of report suites available to the authenticated user within the specified company. Each entry includes the report suite ID, name, and configuration metadata.

response.name: A paginated list of report suites.

item.name: Adobe Analytics Adobe Experience Cloud List Segments

query.description: Comma-separated list of report suite IDs to filter segments.
Maximum number of results to return.
Page number for pagination.

request.description: Returns a paginated list of segments available to the authenticated user. Segments can be filtered by report suite, owner, or tag. Each entry includes the segment ID, name, definition, and sharing status.

item.name: Adobe Analytics Adobe Experience Cloud Create a Segment

request.description: Creates a new segment in Adobe Analytics. The request body must include the segment name, report suite ID, and the segment definition with container and rule criteria.

{userId}
